This package contains operations for the character data type.

subprograms.name: char_code
subprograms.code: procedure char_code(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: Given an integer, return the character with that code or an error.

subprograms.name: char_downcase
subprograms.code: procedure char_downcase(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

subprograms.name: char_upcase
subprograms.code: procedure char_upcase(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: If character is alphabetic, convert to lower case.

subprograms.name: code_char
subprograms.code: procedure code_char(e : out element_type; s : cons_index)

documentation.description: If character is alphabetic, convert to upper case.
